faq_001.question: ትዕዛዜ መቼ ይደርሳል?
faq_001.answer: ሰላም! 😊 ትዕዛዝዎ በ1-3 የሥራ ቀናት ውስጥ እጅዎ ላይ ይደርሳል። ካስቀመጡ በኋላ 📦 'ትዕዛዞች' ገጽ ላይ ሄደው በቀጥታ መከታተል ይችላሉ — እንግዲህ እርስዎን በቅርብ እንከታተላለን!
faq_001.answer_en: Hi there! 😊 Your order will reach you within 1-3 business days. Once placed, you can track it anytime under the 📦 'Orders' page — we're keeping a close eye on it for you!

faq_002.question: ትዕዛዜን እንዴት መሰረዝ ይቻላል?
faq_002.answer: ምንም ችግር የለም! ትዕዛዝ ካስቀመጡ ከ2 ሰዓት ውስጥ በቀላሉ ሰርዝ ማድረግ ይችላሉ። ከ2 ሰዓት ካለፈ ብቻ የደንበኞች አገልግሎታችንን ቡድን ያግኙ — ደስ ብሎን እንረዳዎታለን! 🙏
faq_002.question_en: How can I cancel my order?
faq_002.answer_en: No worries at all! You can cancel within 2 hours of placing the order, no questions asked. If it's been longer, just reach out to our Customer Support team — we're happy to help sort it out. 🙏

faq_003.question: ትዕዛዜ የት ደረሰ?
faq_003.answer: በቀላሉ ማወቅ ይችላሉ! 📦 'ትዕዛዞች' ገጽ ላይ ሄደው ሁኔታውን ይከታተሉ፦ Pending → Processing → Delivered። እርስዎ የት ደረሰ የማወቅ መብት አለዎት፣ ስለዚህ ማንኛውም ጊዜ ይመልከቱ! 😊
faq_003.answer_en: Easy to check! Head over to the 📦 'Orders' page to follow your order's journey: Pending → Processing → Delivered. You deserve to know exactly where it is, so feel free to check anytime! 😊

faq_004.question: ትዕዛዜ 'Processing' ላይ ቆሟል ምን ማለት ነው?
faq_004.answer: 'Processing' ማለት ትዕዛዝዎ ደርሶናል እና በደንብ እያዘጋጅነው ነው ማለት ነው! 💪 ምንም አይጨነቁ — ብዙም ሳይቆይ ለቤትዎ ይላካል። እናመሰግናለን ስለ ትዕግስትዎ!
faq_004.question_en: My order is stuck on 'Processing' — what does that mean?
faq_004.answer_en: 'Processing' simply means we've received your order and are carefully preparing it! 💪 No need to worry — it'll be on its way to you soon. Thank you for your patience!

faq_005.question: የተሳሳተ ምርት ደረሰኝ ምን ላድርግ?
faq_005.answer: በጣም አዝነናል ስለዚህ ስህተት! 🙏 ምርቱ ከደረሰ በ24 ሰዓት ውስጥ የደንበኞች አገልግሎታችንን ያነጋግሩ፣ ትክክለኛውን ምርት በፍጥነት እናቀርብልዎታለን — ቃላችን ነው!
faq_005.question_en: I received the wrong item — what should I do?
faq_005.answer_en: We're so sorry for the mix-up! 🙏 Please contact our Customer Support within 24 hours of receiving the item, and we'll get the correct product to you quickly — that's a promise!

faq_006.question: ምርቱ ተሰብሮ ወይም ጠፍቶ መጣ ምን ላድርግ?
faq_006.answer: በጣም አዝነናል! 💔 ፎቶ ካነሱ በኋላ ወዲያውኑ የደንበኞች አገልግሎታችንን ያግኙ — በፍጥነት እናስተካክልልዎታለን፣ ቅር አንልዎትም!
faq_006.question_en: My item arrived broken or damaged — what do I do?
faq_006.answer_en: We're really sorry to hear that! 💔 Please take a photo and contact our Customer Support team right away — we'll make it right for you quickly, we promise!

faq_007.question: ምርት መመለስ ወይም ማስቀየር ይቻላል?
faq_007.answer: በፍጹም ይቻላል! ምርቱ ከደረሰ በ48 ሰዓት ውስጥ ካልተነካ እና original ሁኔታ ላይ ካለ በቀላሉ መመለስ ይችላሉ። የደንበኞች አገልግሎታችንን ያነጋግሩ እና በፍጥነት እናስተናግድዎታለን። 😊
faq_007.question_en: Can I return or exchange my order?
faq_007.answer_en: Of course! As long as it's within 48 hours of receiving it, unused, and in original condition, returning or exchanging is no problem. Just contact our Customer Support and we'll take great care of you. 😊

faq_008.question: ትዕዛዜን ያሳዩኝ
faq_008.answer: በቀላሉ ማየት ይችላሉ! ከታች ያለውን 📦 'ትዕዛዞች' ቁልፍ ይጫኑ — ያደረጉት ግዢ ሁሉ እዛ ይታያል። 😊
faq_008.answer_en: Easy! Just tap the 📦 'Orders' button at the bottom of the screen — every purchase you've made will be right there. 😊

faq_009.question: የትኞቹ የክፍያ ዘዴዎች ተቀባይነት አላቸው?
faq_009.answer: ብዙ አማራጭ አለን! Telebirr, CBE Birr, Awash Bank, Dashen Bank፣ እንዲሁም Bank Transfer ሁሉንም እንቀበላለን — ለእርስዎ የሚቀልልዎትን ይምረጡ! 💳
faq_009.answer_en: We've got you covered with options! We accept Telebirr, CBE Birr, Awash Bank, Dashen Bank, and Bank Transfer — pick whichever works best for you! 💳

faq_010.question: እንዴት ክፍያ ይፈጸማል?
faq_010.answer: በቀላሉ ይከናወናል! ምርቱን ወደ ጋሪ ካስቀመጡ በኋላ 'ትዕዛዝ ላክ' ይጫኑ፣ የክፍያ ዘዴ ይምረጡ፣ ከዚያ Bank Account ቁጥሩን ያስቀምጡ — ቀላል ነው አይደል? 😊
faq_010.question_en: How do I make a payment?
faq_010.answer_en: Super simple! Add your item to the cart, tap 'Place Order', choose your payment method, then enter the bank account number shown — that's it! 😊

faq_011.question: ክፍያ ከፈለኩ ግን ትዕዛዝ አልተረጋገጠም
faq_011.answer: ምንም አይጨነቁ! ስክሪንሾት ወይም ደረሰኝ ይያዙ ከዚያ የደንበኞች አገልግሎታችንን ያነጋግሩ — ትዕዛዝዎን በቅርብ ጊዜ እናረጋግጥልዎታለን፣ ለእርስዎ ጥንቃቄ እናደርጋለን። 🙏
faq_011.question_en: I paid but my order wasn't confirmed
faq_011.answer_en: Please don't worry! Just keep a screenshot or receipt and contact our Customer Support — we'll confirm your order promptly and take good care of it for you. 🙏

faq_012.question: ሁለቴ ክፍያ ተቆርጦብኛል
faq_012.answer: ይቅርታ ስለዚህ ምስቅልቅል! 🙏 ወዲያው የደንበኞች አገልግሎታችንን ያነጋግሩ፣ ደረሰኙን ይዘው ይምጡ — ሁኔታውን በፍጥነት እናስተካክልልዎታለን፣ ገንዘብዎ ይመለስልዎታል።
faq_012.answer_en: We're sorry for the trouble! 🙏 Please contact our Customer Support right away with your receipts — we'll fix the double charge quickly and make sure your money comes back to you.

faq_013.question: ሂሳቤ ተመልሶ ይሄዳልን?
faq_013.answer: አዎ፣ ሙሉ በሙሉ! ትዕዛዝ ከተሰረዘ ወይም ምርት ከተመለሰ የተከፈለው ገንዘብ ወደ ሒሳብዎ ይመለሳል። 3-5 ቀናት ብቻ ይወስዳል — ታጋሽ ይሁኑ፣ እናመሰግናለን! 😊
faq_013.answer_en: Yes, absolutely! If your order is cancelled or returned, your full payment will be refunded within 3-5 business days. Thanks for your patience — we appreciate you! 😊

faq_014.question: የትኛው ቁጥር ክፍያ ልፈጽም?
faq_014.answer: በቀላሉ ያገኙታል! ትዕዛዝ ሲሰጡ የክፍያ ዝርዝሩ (Bank + Account Number) በራስ-ሰር ይታይልዎታል። ያንኑ ቁጥር ይጠቀሙ — ምንም ላማስታክ የለም! 😊
faq_014.question_en: Which account number should I pay to?
faq_014.answer_en: You'll see it right away! When you place an order, the payment details (Bank + Account Number) are shown automatically — just use that number, nothing to memorize! 😊

faq_015.question: ክፍያ ደህንነቱ የተጠበቀ ነው?
faq_015.answer: ሙሉ በሙሉ ደህና ነው! 🔒 ክፍያ ቀጥታ ወደ Bank ብቻ ነው የሚሄደው — የካርድ ወይም Bank ዝርዝርዎ ከኛ ጋር በፍጹም አይቀመጥም። የእርስዎ ደህንነት ለኛ ቅድሚያ ነው!
faq_015.answer_en: Completely safe! 🔒 Your payment goes directly to the bank — we never store your card or bank details with us. Your security is our top priority!

faq_016.question: Delivery አካባቢ ምን ያህል ነው?
faq_016.answer: በአሁኑ ጊዜ በአዲስ አበባ ውስጥ ለሁሉም ደንበኞቻችን ደስ ብሎን እናደርሳለን! 🏠 ሌሎች ክልሎች በቅርቡ ይታከላሉ — ይጠብቁን!
faq_016.question_en: What areas do you deliver to?
faq_016.answer_en: Right now, we happily deliver throughout Addis Ababa! 🏠 Other regions are coming soon — stay tuned, we're expanding for you!

faq_017.question: Delivery ዋጋ ስንት ነው?
faq_017.answer: Delivery ዋጋ በትዕዛዝ ጊዜ በትክክል ይታይልዎታል — እንደ አካባቢ እና ምርት ይለያያል፣ ምንም የተደበቀ ክፍያ የለም! 😊
faq_017.question_en: How much is the delivery fee?
faq_017.answer_en: The delivery fee is shown clearly when you place your order — it varies by location and item, with absolutely no hidden charges! 😊

faq_018.question: ትዕዛዝ ቤቴ ድረስ ይደርሳልን?
faq_018.answer: በፍጹም አዎ! ትዕዛዝ ሲሰጡ አድራሻዎን ብቻ ያስቀምጡ — እኛ ቤትዎ ድረስ በደህና እናደርሳለን፣ ይህ ቀላል ቃላችን ነው! 🚪📦
faq_018.question_en: Do you deliver to my home?
faq_018.answer_en: Absolutely yes! Just enter your address when placing the order, and we'll deliver it safely right to your doorstep — that's our promise! 🚪📦

faq_019.question: ትዕዛዝ ሊመጣ ሲል ምልክት ይሰጣልን?
faq_019.answer: አዎ፣ ሁልጊዜ እናሳውቅዎታለን! 🔔 ትዕዛዝ ሲወጣ Notification ይደርስዎታል፣ ከ'Processing' እስከ 'Delivered' ድረስ ሁሉንም ደረጃ እናሳውቅዎታለን።
faq_019.question_en: Will I be notified before delivery?
faq_019.answer_en: Yes, we'll always keep you in the loop! 🔔 You'll get a notification when your order ships, and every status update from Processing through Delivered.

faq_020.question: ደሃ አካባቢ ነኝ ይደርሳልን?
faq_020.answer: ብዙ የአዲስ አበባ አካባቢዎችን ደስ ብሎን ሸፍነናል! 🗺️ ትዕዛዝ ሲሰጡ አድራሻዎን ያስቀምጡ — እርግጠኛ ካልሆኑ የደንበኞች አገልግሎታችንን ያግኙ፣ እንረዳዎታለን!
faq_020.question_en: Do you deliver to my neighborhood?
faq_020.answer_en: We happily cover most areas of Addis Ababa! 🗺️ Just enter your address when ordering — if you're not sure, reach out to our Customer Support and we'll help you out!

faq_021.question: ትዕዛዝ ለምን ዘገየ?
faq_021.answer: ይቅርታ ስለዚህ መዘግየት! 🙏 ትዕዛዝ ከ3 የሥራ ቀናት ካለፈ የደንበኞች አገልግሎታችንን ያነጋግሩ — ጉዳዩን በፍጥነት እንከታተልልዎታለን።
faq_021.answer_en: We apologize for the delay! 🙏 If it's been more than 3 business days, please contact our Customer Support and we'll look into it for you right away.

faq_022.question: ምርቶቹ ዋስትና (Warranty) አላቸው?
faq_022.answer: ምርቱ ላይ ዋስትና ካለ በግልጽ ይታይዎታል! 🛡️ ምርት ሲደርስ የምርት ዝርዝሩን ቆም ብለው ያንቡ — ለማንኛውም ጥያቄ እኛ እዚህ ነን!
faq_022.question_en: Do products come with a warranty?
faq_022.answer_en: If a product comes with a warranty, it's clearly shown on the page! 🛡️ Take a moment to check the product details when it arrives — we're here for any questions!

faq_023.question: ምርቱ ኦሪጅናል ነው?
faq_023.answer: በሙሉ ልብ ይተማመኑ! ✅ ምርቶቻችን ሁሉ ከተረጋገጡ አቅራቢዎች ብቻ ነው የምናመጣው። ምርት ላይ ያለውን 'Condition' ዝርዝር ቆም ብለው ያንቡ።
faq_023.answer_en: Rest assured! ✅ All our products come exclusively from verified suppliers. Be sure to check the 'Condition' section on each product page.

faq_024.question: ምርቱ Stock ውስጥ አለ?
faq_024.answer: በቀላሉ ማወቅ ይችላሉ! 'Add to Cart' ቁልፍ ካለ ክምችት ዝግጁ ነው ማለት ነው። 'Out of Stock' ቢል ብቻ ጊዜያዊ ነው — ትንሽ ቆይተው እንደገና ይሞክሩ!
faq_024.answer_en: Easy to tell! If the 'Add to Cart' button is showing, it's in stock and ready to go. 'Out of Stock' just means temporarily unavailable — check back soon!

faq_025.question: ምርቱ ዋጋ ይቀነሳልን?
faq_025.answer: ዋጋ ወቅታዊ ሆኖ ይቀጥላል 💰 ምርቱን Favorites ውስጥ ቢያስቀምጡ ግን ቅናሽ ሲመጣ መጀመሪያ እርስዎ ያውቃሉ! ይህ ትንሽ ምስጢራችን ነው 😉
faq_025.question_en: Will the product price go down?
faq_025.answer_en: Prices stay current 💰 but if you save the item to Favorites, you'll be the first to know when a discount comes along! That's our little secret 😉

faq_026.question: ምርቱ ስዕሉ ከደረሰው ጋር ይለያያልን?
faq_026.answer: የምርቶቻችን ፎቶ ትክክለኛ መሆኑን እናረጋግጣለን! 📸 ካልሆነ ግን ይቅርታ — ወዲያው የደንበኞች አገልግሎታችንን ያግኙ፣ ለእርስዎ እናስተካክለዋለን።
faq_026.question_en: Does the product look different from the photo?
faq_026.answer_en: We make sure our product photos are accurate! 📸 But if something looks off, we're sorry — reach out to our Customer Support right away and we'll set things right for you.

faq_027.question: ምርትን እንዴት ይፈለጋል?
faq_027.answer: ቀላል ነው! 🔍 ከላይ ያለውን Search ቁልፍ ይጫኑ ወይም Category ይምረጡ — የፈለጉትን ምርት በፍጥነት ያገኛሉ!
faq_027.question_en: How do I search for a product?
faq_027.answer_en: Quick and easy! 🔍 Tap the Search button at the top, or browse by category — you'll find what you're looking for in no time!

faq_028.question: ምርቱ ምን ምን ቀለሞች አሉት?
faq_028.answer: ብዙ ቀለም አማራጮች አሉ! 🎨 ምርቱን ሲከፍቱ 'Colors' ክፍል ስር ያሉትን ይመልከቱ እና የሚስማማዎትን ይምረጡ።
faq_028.question_en: What colors does this product come in?
faq_028.answer_en: There are plenty of color options! 🎨 Open the product page and check the 'Colors' section to see and pick the one you love.

faq_029.question: ጋሪ (Cart) ውስጥ ምርቶቼ ጠፉ
faq_029.answer: ይቅርታ ስለዚህ! ጋሪ ምርቶች Browser Cache ላይ ይቀመጣሉ — Cache ቢጸዳ ሊጠፋ ይችላል። ምንም አይደለም፣ ዳግም ይጨምሩ እና እንቀጥል! 😊
faq_029.answer_en: Sorry about that! Cart items are stored in your browser cache, so clearing it can remove them. No worries — just add them again and we're good to go! 😊

faq_030.question: ምርት ወደ ጋሪ ለምን አልተጨመረም?
faq_030.answer: ምንም አይጨነቁ፣ እንፍታው! 1️⃣ ምርቱ Stock ውስጥ መኖሩን ያረጋግጡ 2️⃣ Account ውስጥ መግባትዎን ያረጋግጡ። ይህ ካልሰራ ያነጋግሩን!
faq_030.question_en: Why can't I add the item to my cart?
faq_030.answer_en: Let's figure this out together! 1️⃣ Check the product is in stock. 2️⃣ Make sure you're logged into your account. Still stuck? Just reach out to us!

faq_031.question: ከጋሪ ምርት እንዴት ይወጣል?
faq_031.answer: ቀላል ነው! ጋሪ ውስጥ ሄደው ምርቱ ጎን ያለውን ❌ ወይም '−' ቁልፍ ይጫኑ — በፍጥነት ይወገዳል። 😊
faq_031.question_en: How do I remove an item from my cart?
faq_031.answer_en: Simple! Go to your Cart and tap the ❌ or '−' button next to the item — it'll be removed in a snap. 😊

faq_032.question: Account ሌላ ሰው ሊጠቀምበት ይችላልን?
faq_032.answer: የእርስዎ ደህንነት ለኛ ቅድሚያ ነው! 🔐 Account ዎ በOTP ብቻ የተቆለፈ ነው — ስልክዎን ይጠብቁ። ስጋት ቢሰማዎት የደንበኞች አገልግሎታችንን ያግኙ፣ በፍጥነት እንረዳዎታለን።
faq_032.question_en: Can someone else access my account?
faq_032.answer_en: Your security matters most to us! 🔐 Your account is locked behind OTP — just keep your phone safe. If anything feels off, contact our Customer Support and we'll help right away.

faq_033.question: የክፍያ መረጃዬ ደህንነቱ የተጠበቀ ነው?
faq_033.answer: ሙሉ በሙሉ ደህና ነው፣ ያለ ምንም ስጋት! 🔒 ክፍያ ቀጥታ ወደ Bank ብቻ ነው የሚሄደው — የካርድ ወይም Bank ዝርዝርዎ በፍጹም ከኛ ጋር አይቀመጥም።
faq_033.answer_en: Completely safe, no need to worry! 🔒 Payments go directly to the bank — we never, ever store your card or bank details.

faq_034.question: ፓስዎርድ ጠፋብኝ እንዴት ላድስ?
faq_034.answer: ምንም አይጨነቁ — የእውን ህልም አፕ ፓስዎርድ አያስፈልገውም! 😊 OTP (ስልክ ቁጥር) ብቻ ይጠቀማል፣ ስልክ ቁጥርዎን ያስገቡ እና OTP ይምጣልዎ።
faq_034.question_en: I forgot my password — how do I reset it?
faq_034.answer_en: No need to worry — Ewn Hlm doesn't even use passwords! 😊 We use OTP only — just enter your phone number and receive a one-time code.

faq_035.question: OTP አልደረሰኝም
faq_035.answer: ችላ አይበሉ፣ ትንሽ ይታገሱ! ⏱️ OTP ለመድረስ 1-2 ደቂቃ ይጠብቁ። SMS ካልደረሰ ስልኩ ምልክት እንዳለው ያረጋግጡ ወይም ዳግም ይሞክሩ — እኛም እዚህ ነን ካስፈለገ!
faq_035.answer_en: Just hang in there a moment! ⏱️ Wait 1-2 minutes for the OTP. If it still doesn't arrive, check your signal and try again — we're here if you need more help!

faq_036.question: መለያዬን (Account) እንዴት ማስተካከል ይቻላል?
faq_036.answer: በቀላሉ ማስተካከል ይችላሉ! Profile → መገለጫ ሄደው ስምዎን ወይም አድራሻዎን ማደስ ይችላሉ — የእርስዎ መረጃ የእርስዎ ብቻ ነው! 😊
faq_036.question_en: How do I edit my account details?
faq_036.answer_en: Easy to update! Go to Profile → Edit Profile to refresh your name or address — your info, your control! 😊

faq_037.question: ከ account ሳወጣ ትዕዛዞቼ ይጠፋሉ?
faq_037.answer: በፍጹም አይጠፉም! 🔒 ትዕዛዞችዎ በደመና (Cloud) ላይ በደህና ተቀምጠዋል። ዳግም ሲገቡ ሁሉም ታሪክዎ ልክ እንደነበረው ይታያል!
faq_037.question_en: Will my orders disappear if I log out?
faq_037.answer_en: They will absolutely not disappear! 🔒 Your orders are safely stored in the cloud. When you log back in, your full history will be right there waiting for you!

faq_038.question: ስልኬን ቀየርኩ — account ይጠፋልን?
faq_038.answer: ስልክ ቁጥርዎ ቀየሩ? ምንም ችግር የለውም — አዲሱን ቁጥር ይግቡ! ብቻ ያስታውሱ፣ ታሪክ በራስ-ሰር አይዛወርም ስለዚህ የደንበኞች አገልግሎታችንን ያግኙ እና በደስታ እናስተላልፍልዎታለን።
faq_038.question_en: I changed my phone number — will my account be lost?
faq_038.answer_en: Changed your phone number? No problem — just log in with the new one! Just keep in mind, order history won't transfer automatically, so contact our Customer Support and we'll happily move it over for you.

faq_039.question: Account ዘጋሁ ወይም ሰረዝኩ ምን ይሆናል?
faq_039.answer: ይቅርታ ስለሚለዩን! 💔 Account ለመሰረዝ የደንበኞች አገልግሎታችንን ያነጋግሩ — ቅድሚያ ይህን ውሳኔ በደንብ ያስቡበት፣ ምክንያቱም ሁሉም መረጃ (ቀደም ያሉ ትዕዛዞች ጨምሮ) ይጠፋል።
faq_039.question_en: What happens if I delete my account?
faq_039.answer_en: Sorry to see you go! 💔 To delete your account, contact our Customer Support — just know that all data, including past orders, will be permanently removed, so take your time deciding.

faq_040.question: መተግበሪያው ሳይሠራ ቀረ ምን ላድርግ?
faq_040.answer: ምንም አይጨነቁ፣ አብረን እንፍታው! 1️⃣ መተግበሪያውን ዝጋና ዳግም ይክፈቱ 2️⃣ ስልኩን Restart ያድርጉ 3️⃣ ካልሰራ Cache ጽዳ ወይም ዳግም install ያድርጉ — እኛም ካስፈለገ እዚህ ነን!
faq_040.question_en: The app is not working — what should I do?
faq_040.answer_en: Don't worry, let's sort it out together! 1️⃣ Close and reopen the app. 2️⃣ Restart your phone. 3️⃣ If it still won't work, clear cache or reinstall — and we're here if you need more help!

faq_041.question: ምርቶች አይጫኑም (loading)
faq_041.answer: በቀላሉ መፍታት ይቻላል! 1️⃣ Internet ምልክት ያረጋግጡ 2️⃣ አፕ ዝጋ ዳግም ይክፈቱ 3️⃣ ካልሰራ ዳግም install ያድርጉ — ብዙም ሳይቆይ መልካም ይሆናል! 😊
faq_041.answer_en: Quick fix! 1️⃣ Check your internet connection. 2️⃣ Close and reopen the app. 3️⃣ If that doesn't help, reinstall — it'll be smooth sailing again soon! 😊

faq_042.question: መተግበሪያውን እንዴት ወደ ስልኬ መጫን ይቻላል?
faq_042.answer: በፍጥነት ይጫናል! 📲 Profile → 'Install App' ቁልፍ ይጫኑ፣ Browser ውስጥ 'Add to Home Screen' ይምረጡ — እና አፕዎ ልክ እንደ ሌላ app በስልክዎ ላይ ይታያል!
faq_042.question_en: How do I install the app on my phone?
faq_042.answer_en: Quick to install! 📲 Go to Profile → tap 'Install App', then in your browser choose 'Add to Home Screen' — and just like that, it's on your phone like any other app!

faq_043.question: Notification አልደርሰኝም
faq_043.answer: ቀላል ችግር ነው፣ እንፍታው! 1️⃣ Browser/Phone Notification ፈቅዱ 2️⃣ Profile → Notifications ላይ ሄደው ተፈቅዷል ወይ ያረጋግጡ — ከዚያ ምንም አይዘልልዎትም! 🔔
faq_043.answer_en: Easy fix! 1️⃣ Allow notifications in your browser/phone settings. 2️⃣ Check Profile → Notifications is enabled — and you won't miss a thing from now on! 🔔

faq_044.question: ቋንቋ (Language) እንዴት ይቀየራል?
faq_044.answer: በቀላሉ ይቀየራል! Profile → Language ሄደው አማርኛ ወይም English ይምረጡ — የእርስዎ ቋንቋ የእርስዎ ምርጫ ነው! 🌐
faq_044.question_en: How do I change the language?
faq_044.answer_en: Quick to switch! Go to Profile → Language and choose Amharic or English — your language, your choice! 🌐

faq_045.question: Dark Mode እንዴት ማብራት ይቻላል?
faq_045.answer: በቀላሉ ያበራል! 🌙 Profile → Theme ሄደው Dark Mode ቁልፉን ያብሩ — ምሽት ላይ ዓይንዎ ያርፋል!
faq_045.question_en: How do I enable Dark Mode?
faq_045.answer_en: Quick to turn on! 🌙 Go to Profile → Theme and toggle on Dark Mode — easy on the eyes at night!

faq_046.question: Refer & Earn እንዴት ይሠራል?
faq_046.answer: ይህን ይወዱታል! 🎁 Profile → Refer & Earn ሄደው Referral Code ቅዱ፣ ለወዳጆችዎ ያጋሩ — ሁለታችሁም ሽልማት ታገኛላችሁ! ወዳጅነት ይክፋል!
faq_046.answer_en: You'll love this one! 🎁 Go to Profile → Refer & Earn, copy your referral code, and share it with friends — you both get rewarded! Sharing really does pay off!

faq_047.question: የምወዳቸውን ምርቶች (Favorites) የት ይታያሉ?
faq_047.answer: በቀላሉ ያገኙታል! ❤️ ከላይ ያለውን ቁልፍ ይጫኑ ወይም ምርት ላይ ❤️ ይጫኑ — የወደዱትን ሁሉ Favorites ዝርዝርዎ ላይ ደህና ያስቀምጧቸዋል!
faq_047.question_en: Where can I see my favorite products?
faq_047.answer_en: Right at your fingertips! ❤️ Tap the heart icon at the top, or tap ❤️ on any product to save it — everything you love is kept safe in your Favorites list!

faq_048.question: Ewn Hlm ማን ነው?
faq_048.answer: እውን ህልም (Ewn Hlm) የኢትዮጵያ Digital Marketplace ነው — ሕልምዎ እውን የሚሆንበት ቦታ! 🛍️ ለእያንዳንዱ ደንበኛችን በፍቅር እና በትህትና ለማገልገል ቆርጠናል!
faq_048.answer_en: Ewn Hlm is Ethiopia's Digital Marketplace — where your dreams become reality! 🛍️ We're committed to serving every single customer with warmth and respect!

faq_049.question: Ewn Hlm ለ Seller ምርት መሸጥ ይቻላል?
faq_049.answer: ገና ለ Seller ክፈት አልሆነም፣ ግን ብዙ የሚያምር ነገር ይዘን እንመጣለን! 🌟 Notification ይከታተሉ — ሲከፈት መጀመሪያ የእርስዎ ጋር ይነገራል!
faq_049.question_en: Can I sell products on Ewn Hlm?
faq_049.answer_en: Seller registration isn't open just yet, but exciting things are coming! 🌟 Keep an eye on your notifications — you'll be among the first to know when it opens!

faq_050.question: Ewn Hlm ን እንዴት ያግኙ?
faq_050.answer: በደስታ! 😊 🌐 ewn-hlm.web.app • Profile → Help Center • ኢሜይል: dannniefx55@gmail.com — እኛ ሁልጊዜ ለእርስዎ እዚህ ነን!
faq_050.question_en: How do I contact Ewn Hlm?
faq_050.answer_en: Happy to help! 😊 🌐 ewn-hlm.web.app • Profile → Help Center • Email: dannniefx55@gmail.com — we're always here for you!
